headline: DoorDash (DASH) Pushes Into Auto Parts As Its Valuation Case Gets A Fresh Look
summary: DoorDash (DASH) is pushing further into non food retail after AutoParts.com Inc. brought hundreds of thousands of auto parts onto DoorDash Marketplace, supported by geo located inventory and a promotional launch offer. See our latest analysis for DoorDash. At a share price of US$188.46, DoorDash has seen a strong 30 day share price return of 20.19% and a 90 day share price return of 20.89%. However, the year to date share price return is down 14.25%, while the 3 year total shareholder return...
